Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.api.base

Interface GordianIdSpec

All Known Subinterfaces:
GordianCipherSpec<T>, GordianDigestSpec, GordianKeySpec, GordianMacSpec, GordianStreamCipherSpec, GordianStreamKeySpec, GordianSymCipherSpec, GordianSymKeySpec
All Known Implementing Classes:
